keywords: suspend not delete updateDocument cascadeToSubscriptions TenantSuspended DataPurgeRequested tombstoneRef SHA-256 one-way hash TenantTerminated compliance audit trail termination delegation
teachingPoint: T608 TenantLifecycleManager MUST use updateDocument for suspension — deleteDocument destroys the audit trail. TenantSuspended MUST carry cascadeToSubscriptions:true. Data purge is delegated via DataPurgeRequested event on termination only — never on suspension. tombstoneRef in purge/termination events MUST be SHA-256 hash of tenantId, never the raw value.
ironRules: Suspension uses updateDocument({ status: 'SUSPENDED' }) — deleteDocument is prohibited
TenantSuspended event always includes cascadeToSubscriptions: true
DataPurgeRequested emitted only in termination path — never during suspension
tombstoneRef = SHA-256 hash of tenantId — raw tenantId never in purge or termination events
Data retention window from FREEDOM config (tenant_data_retention_days) — no hardcoded retention period
